Power of Planets. The Sun and the Moon are king; Jupiter and
Venus are ministers, Mercury is prince: Mars is Senapati (General) and
Saturn is a Doota (messenger and proletariat). Of the seven planets,
the Sun and the Moon are political and Rajayogakarak.a planets, and
their lnfllence Is superior to that of other planets. 1n natural strength,
Mars is superior to Saturn.
